title: botrychium lunaria var. onondagense
intro: Botrychium lunaria var. onondagense, also known as Onondaga grape fern, is a rare and unique species of fern native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The Onondaga grape fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
